title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Urban Ladder

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Urban Ladder
jsonLd.description:
Join the Urban Ladder family as a SEO Specialist in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Urban Ladder:
Urban Ladder is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder!
